[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001100 3
1 100001111 5
2 111001011 6
3 001101101 5
4 110111111 8
5 111110011 7
6 001111101 6
7 110111110 7

70 07 100101001 4
